query: brachytherapy source exchange QA verification well chamber

results.title: Samarium-145: a new brachytherapy source.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 3615583. 1987/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: High dose rate (HDR) brachytherapy rapidly delivers dose to targets 
with steep dose gradients. This treatment method must adhere to prescribed 
treatment plans with high spatiotemporal accuracy and precision, as failure to 
do so may degrade clinical outcomes. One approach to achieving this goal is to 
develop imaging techniques to track HDR sources in vivo in reference to 
surrounding anatomy. This work investigates the feasibility of using an 
is
